title: Configure Line Numbering in the Script Editor
breadcrumbs: Configure Line Numbering in the Script Editor
text: Configure Line Numbering in the Script Editor By default, the Script Editor is configured to show line numbers and folding buttons. If you have large amount of code in your code container, you can choose to hide line numbers to improve performance. The following are the different ways to configure the line numbers and folding buttons settings: No gutters specified (default): Displays line numbers and folding buttons. gutters=fold: Only displays folding buttons. To hide line numbers, edit the property within the SourceEdit definition inside the [widgets] section in the usys.ini file: ;usys.ini [widgets] ... SourceEdit=usrcedit(...;gutters=fold;..)
